    1. getBlock()

Interface LootableBlockInventory

All Superinterfaces:
Lootable, LootableInventory
All Known Subinterfaces:
Barrel, Chest, Crafter, Dispenser, Dropper, Hopper, ShulkerBox
@NullMarked public interface LootableBlockInventory extends LootableInventory
Represents an Inventory that can generate loot, such as Chests inside of Fortresses and Mineshafts

    Block
    getBlock()
    Gets the block that is lootable
